source_pr.title: planner: fix correlated columns in filter or access in MPP apply
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tics/issues/1606, https://github.com/pingcap/tics/issues/1607, https://github.com/pingcap/tics/issues/1612 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:
mpp gather does not consider `apply` operator, which updates correlated columns during execution.
How it Works:

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Integration test 

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note<!-- Please write a release note here to describe the change you made when it is released to the users of TiDB. If your PR doesn't involve any change to TiDB(like test enhancements, RFC proposals...), you can write `No release note`. -->

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ agg_to_cop(), hash_agg()*/ count(*) from x1 where a >= any (select a from x2 where x1.a = x2.a) order by 1;").Check(testkit.Rows("3")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ agg_to_cop(), hash_agg()*/ count(*) from x1 where a >= any (select a from x2 where x1.a = x2.a) order by 1;").Check(testkit.Rows("3")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ agg_to_cop(), hash_agg()*/ count(*) from x1 where a >= any (select a from x2 where x1.a = x2.a) order by 1;").Check(testkit.Rows("3")) (executor/tiflash_test.go).
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ agg_to_cop(), hash_agg()*/ count(*) from x1 where a >= any (select a from x2 where x1.a = x2.a) order by 1;").Check(testkit.Rows("3")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ agg_to_cop(), hash_agg()*/ count(*) from x1 where a >= any (select a from x2 where x1.a = x2.a) order by 1;").Check(testkit.Rows("3")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)

files: executor/distsql_test.go, executor/mpp_gather.go, executor/table_reader.go, executor/tiflash_test.go, planner/core/fragment.go, planner/core/physical_plans.go, store/mockstore/unistore/cophandler/closure_exec.go
